script: Foley's Cutroom is where auto-generated walkthrough videos land after each pull request, ready for review. Each folder here is a live walkthrough, showing step count, take count, and how recently it was updated. Opening the Stateless Header Test shows all three steps Foley recorded, ready to inspect and approve. Steps appear in order, each with a thumbnail preview so you can verify what Foley captured before approving. Foley even maintains its own walkthrough — every project stays current as the product evolves with each new PR.
